text_excerpt: Events - Natalie Bennett Green Party Peer #NatalieGreenPeer Latest About About Natalie Publications Podcasts Events Other Roles Events Please check out the events listed below. Speaking with Merton Green Party 7pm 23rd June Talking Green Thinking at Verey Books in the Lake District At Pooley Bridge, Lake District 7pm 17th June 2026 Book here Green Thinking at Owl Bookshop Wednesday 6.30pm 10th June 2026 Book here Speaking at Eastern Green Party Regional Conference Park Inn Palace Hotel, Southend-on-Sea, Essex from 10am Book here Green Thinking and How to Change Everything at Swansea University Public Talk with Baroness Bennett 12pm 20th May 2026 Reserve here British Ecological Society event Could Rights of Nature save Britain’s disappearing wildlife? Book here Campaigning in Huddersfield Meeting at Huddersfield Train Station 7am 27th April – come leaflet with Natalie More here A Sunday evening with Natalie Bennett Join us 7pm 26th April in Huddersfield. With campaign update from Councillor Andrew Cooper More here Campaigning in Barnet Meeting 10.30am Arts Depot, 5 Nether St, London N12 0GA for door knocking and lunch and more door knocking!
